Profile.imageAlt: Profile picture of Wilmer Soto Vidal

Hero.title: I am Wilmer Soto, <y>developer</y> and <y>systems engineer</y>.
Hero.description: I am Wilmer Soto Vidal, a Systems Engineering graduate from the Universidad de Antioquia with experience as a Front-end Developer, creating modern interfaces with Next.js and Tailwind CSS. I am proficient in languages such as Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, Java, HTML, and CSS, and my skills also extend to the backend with Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, Docker, and tools like Git, GitHub Actions, and Postman.

Knowledge.title: My Knowledge
Knowledge.description: Explore a summary of my skills and the key technologies I am proficient in as a software developer.

Education.title: Education
Education.headerDescription: My educational background has been key to establishing a solid foundation in engineering, preparing me with theoretical tools to face real-world challenges.

udea.description: Deepening my knowledge in computer science fundamentals, algorithms, data structures, and the development of complex systems.

nextjs.description: Mastering essential React principles to build dynamic user interfaces, complemented by Next.js modern architecture and rendering capabilities for high-performance applications.

Portfolio.title: My Projects
Portfolio.description: This section showcases a selection of my personal and academic projects, illustrating my development process and the diverse range of technologies I have implemented.

docManagement.title: Document Management and Upload
docManagement.imageAlt: View of a document management program
docManagement.description: Student document upload and management system.
docManagement.longDescription:
Web application for managing and uploading course documents.
Allows viewing personal and instructor-shared materials.
Includes features to download, edit, and share documents.

inventory.title: Inventory Management
inventory.imageAlt: View of an inventory management program
inventory.description: Transaction management application built with Python.
inventory.longDescription:
Application for managing financial transactions. Allows tracking income, expenses, and transaction details.
Features combined or filtered list views.
Includes functionality to export all reports to Excel.

digitalTransformation.title: Digital Transformation Self-Assessment
digitalTransformation.imageAlt: GitHub view of the Self-Assessment project
digitalTransformation.description: Backend for a corporate digital transformation assessment platform.
digitalTransformation.longDescription:
System featuring user registration and a 7-part self-assessment.
Calculates digital maturity levels based on specific industry metrics.
Generates visual reports and PDFs based on assessment results.

WhyHireMe.title: Why Should You Hire Me?
WhyHireMe.description: Beyond my technical skills, this section highlights the unique value I bring to every project and team. Discover my key strengths as a developer and how my proactive approach and holistic thinking can benefit your company.

problemSolving.title: Problem Solving & Autonomy
items: Approach challenges with an analytical and proactive mindset.
Seek innovative and efficient solutions for technical obstacles.
Propose improvements actively without requiring external instructions.

comprehensive.title: End-to-End Vision & Adaptability
items: Comprehensive software understanding backed by a Systems Engineering background.
Proficiency across the full development lifecycle (Frontend, Backend, & DB).
Rapid adaptation to new environments and modern architectures.

quality.title: Technical Quality & Collaboration
items: Deliver clean, well-documented, and scalable code.
Focus on excellence and collective performance.
